title: Commitment Schemes
description: Commitment schemes let someone bind to a value now and reveal it later. Bitcoin and adjacent cryptographic systems use commitments to anchor later verification without exposing all underlying data upfront.

resources.title: Commitment Scheme
resources.notes: Compact overview of the hiding and binding properties.

resources.title: BIP 141: Segregated Witness
resources.notes: Concrete Bitcoin example of a witness commitment embedded in consensus rules.

resources.title: STARK paper
resources.notes: Shows how hash-based commitments appear inside modern proof systems.
